must_detect.matched_text: Confidential Term Sheet — Proposed Share Acquisition of Aoi Data Trust K.K. by Kitanori Holdings Co., Ltd. (Japan)
Transaction overview: Buyer to acquire 100% of Target via negotiated TOB; listing venue: Nippon Securities Exchange (Prime Segment, fictional) — signing targeted Q3 FY2026.

Financing: Mix of senior term loan and privately placed unsecured convertible bonds; no public solicitation; any bond terms not for general distribution under the Financial Instruments and Exchange Act.

Cyber/security covenants: Target to deliver third-party SOC2-type report and implement MFA rollout before closing; Buyer reserves JPY 1.2 billion indemnity cap for pre-closing cyber liabilities and any regulatory penalties related to token custody controls.

Cyber/security covenants: Target to deliver third-party SOC2-type report and implement MFA rollout before closing; Buyer reserves JPY 1.2 billion indemnity cap for pre-closing cyber liabilities and any regulatory penalties related to token custody controls.
ESG/climate undertakings: Target to align climate reporting with TCFD-consistent metrics and supply chain data verification; breach of verified ESG KPI may reduce earn-out.
Conduct of business: No new crypto product launches, wallet migrations, or changes to key cloud providers without Buyer consent between signing and closing.
Approvals: Board approvals of both parties required; if external financing is not obtained within exclusivity, Buyer may terminate on payment of a JPY 850 million reverse break fee.
